message:
✨ New version 3.7

• Hide OTHERS moved from the three dots (⋮) to SETTINGS as a saved switch. Turn it on once and OTHERS stops getting in the way when looking for duplicate locations.
• Duplicate locations only now GROUPS pallets by location: each repeated spot shows together as 📍 LOC ×N.
• Manager announcements now appear ON TOP of any app you are working in, not just inside AUnload Rescue.
• In the manager panel, the pallet count no longer counts OTHERS.

Download and install now?
